title: LOTRing of Undying
description: This replaced the Totem of Undying with One Ring to Rule them all!
body:
This resource pack completely replaces the traditional Totem of Undying with the legendary **One Ring to Rule Them All**!
It functions seamlessly without requiring any mods, meaning it works in a fully vanilla-compatible environment. You can enjoy this unique twist while preserving performance, compatibility, and ease of use, making the experience both immersive and accessible.
